sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00-05');
SELECT age(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = TIMESTAMP '2015-05-15 15:00:00-05' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, age(event_date) AS event_age FROM test_dates;
